1 ^ Laudā: 2 ^ Laudābō Dominum in vītā meā~; psallem Deō meō quamdiū fuerō. ^ I will praise the Lord in my life~; I will sing to my God as long as I shall be.

Dominum. ^ Praise the Lord: in quibus nōn est salūs. ^ Put not your trust in princes
column5: in whom there is no salvation.

anima mea: et revertētur in terram suam~; in illā diē perībunt omnēs cōgitātiōnēs eōrum. ^ His spirit shall go forth
Dominum. ^ Praise the Lord: and he shall return into his earth~; in that day all their thoughts shall perish.

1 ^ Laudā: 5 ^ Beātus cujus Deus Jācōbis adjūtor ejus
anima mea: spēs ejus in Dominō Deō ipsīus
Dominum. ^ Praise the Lord: ^ Blessed is he who hath the God of Jacob for his helper
whose hope is in the Lord his God

Dominum. ^ Praise the Lord: et omnia quae in eīs sunt
column7: and all things that are in them~; who keepeth truth for ever

anima mea: dat ēscam ēsurientibus. Dominus solvit compedītōs~; ^ who executeth judgment for them that suffer wrong
Dominum. ^ Praise the Lord: who giveth food to the hungry. The Lord looseth them that are fettered~;

1 ^ Laudā: 8 ^ Dominus illūminat caecōs~; Dominus ērigit ēlīsōs~; Dominus dīligit jūstōs. ^ the Lord enlighteneth the blind~; the Lord lifteth up them that are cast down~; the Lord loveth the just.
9 ^ Dominus custōdit advenās~; pūpillum et viduam suscipiet
anima mea: et viās peccātōrum disperdet. ^ The Lord keepeth the strangers~; he will support the fatherless and the widow
Dominum. ^ Praise the Lord: and the ways of sinners he will destroy.

1 ^ Laudā: 10 ^ Regnābit Dominus in saecula~; Deus tuus
Dominum. ^ Praise the Lord: in generātiōnem et generātiōnem. ^ The Lord shall reign for ever~; thy God
